title: Traditional Lohri Quotes & the Importance of Gift
description: Traditional quotes are an important part of Lohri celebrations, with popular ones including "Sunder mundriye ho!", "Twinkle twinkle little star, Lohri ke din mein karo naughtiyan", and "Dulla Bhatti wala, ho!". Gifts are also a key aspect of the festival, symbolizing the sharing of joy and happiness with loved ones and helping to strengthen relationships.
